title: EcoPulse
overview: EcoPulse is a sustainability dashboard platform that helps organisations track, reduce, and offset their carbon footprint in real time. We made complex environmental data legible and actionable for non-expert users.
challenge: Sustainability managers were drowning in spreadsheets and siloed data sources. No single product gave them a clear, real-time view of their environmental impact — let alone told them what to do about it.
solution: A clean, modular dashboard with clear data hierarchy, contextual recommendations, and one-click offset options. We prioritised scannability over density, letting users move from insight to action in seconds.
research: Stakeholder interviews with 12 sustainability leads across 4 sectors
Card sorting to establish the right data hierarchy

process.description: Mapped the current workflows of sustainability managers; identified the biggest pain point as 'data overload with no clear next step'.
Defined a modular card system allowing each team to customise their dashboard without overwhelming newcomers.
Chose a calm, nature-inspired colour palette to reinforce the environmental mission without sacrificing data legibility.
Shipped a Figma design system plus annotated handoff specs; co-presented at a client sustainability summit.

results: Reporting time reduced by 60% across pilot organisations
Shortlisted for the Green Tech Design Award 2023
